description_long: This office building is a large, rectangular structure with a flat roof and a predominantly concrete or stone facade. The exterior features a highly regular grid of narrow vertical windows, evenly spaced across the length of the building, giving it a monolithic and institutional appearance. The roof is punctuated by several raised sections and skylights, suggesting internal divisions or specialized rooms. The ends of the building display more pronounced geometric detailing, with layered setbacks and additional window groupings. The overall color palette is a muted grayish-white, contributing to a stark, utilitarian aesthetic. There is minimal ornamentation, and the building's design emphasizes function and repetition over decorative elements.
description: A large, rectangular office building with a flat roof, regular vertical windows, and a stark, grayish-white facade. The design is utilitarian and monolithic, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: The long facade is visible, showing a repetitive grid of narrow vertical windows and a flat roof with several raised sections.
description_view_1: The short end of the building is seen, highlighting geometric setbacks and layered architectural details.
description_view_2: The opposite long facade is shown, mirroring the window grid and flat roof, with subtle differences in rooftop structures.
description_view_3: The other short end is visible, featuring similar setbacks and a clear view of rooftop skylights and raised sections.
attribute_window_pattern: Highly regular, vertical strip windows evenly spaced in a grid pattern across all facades.
